title: Gift of the Elves applies four stat bonuses for one turn cycle

card.rawText: For 1 turn cycle, the equipped creature gains Atk: +3. Hit: +3. SPD: +3. AL: +3.

plan.title: Gift of the Elves applies four stat bonuses for one turn cycle
plan.summary: Equip Gift of the Elves to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify the printed Atk, Hit, SPD, and AL bonuses while active.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the bonuses come only from Gift of the Elves.

steps: Player 1 plays Gift of the Elves and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective AL and SPD.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect hit roll modifier and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +3 Atk bonus
Gift of the Elves remains equipped/on field

manualVerification: Confirm the bonuses expire after the printed 1 turn cycle.
riskNotes: This fixture validates the active stat bonuses; turn-cycle expiration remains a manual/future assertion.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Gift of the Elves equipped stat modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
